title: clarkia virgata subsp. australis
intro: Clarkia virgata subsp. australis, also known as the mountain fairy fanfare or purple gilia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clarkia virgata subsp. australis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Clarkia virgata subsp. australis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
